title: Ladakh High Altitude Adventure
shortDescription: High mountain passes, crystal clear lakes, and ancient monasteries.
overview: A thrilling journey through the rugged terrains of Ladakh. Cross the mighty Khardung La, ride double-humped camels in Nubra, and camp by the mesmerizing Pangong Lake.

itinerary.title: Leh to Nubra Valley
itinerary.description: Drive via Khardung La, evening camel safari.

itinerary.title: Turtuk Excursion
itinerary.description: Visit the last village on the Indo-Pak border.

itinerary.title: Nubra to Pangong Tso
itinerary.description: Drive to Pangong Lake via Shyok river.

itinerary.title: Pangong to Leh
itinerary.description: Sunrise at lake, drive back to Leh via Chang La.
